subcategory: Image thumbnail carousel with smooth horizontal scrolling
use_cases: Displaying collections of images in a horizontally scrollable gallery
Showcasing photo portfolios with thumbnail previews and titles
Creating product image carousels for e-commerce listings
Building travel or nature photography showcases with smooth navigation
Implementing image galleries with drag-to-scroll interaction on desktop and mobile
ai_summary: A thumbnail carousel component that displays images in a horizontally scrollable gallery with smooth Framer Motion animations. Features drag-to-scroll interaction and displays image titles beneath thumbnails. Designed for showcasing collections of images like photo portfolios, product galleries, or visual content displays across desktop and mobile platforms.
